title: IESET Policy Axes Taxonomy
description: Canonical list of policy axes. Policies are scored per-axis; movements summarise across axes. Every `axis` string in a policy/movement YAML must reference an id defined here. Axes are grouped by channel per Invariant 4 (fiscal vs regulatory separation).

+.description: What moving in the + direction means (policy-content, not normative).

-.description: What moving in the - direction means.

source_publishers.description: Publisher ids (per publishers.yaml) that carry axis-level panel data. Informs which fetchers the data agent needs ready for axis-level charts.

typical_proxies.description: Series or indices commonly used to measure this axis, e.g. 'Fraser EFW area 1b' or 'OECD PMR aggregate'.
